# Analysis of Nature-based solutions

Author1, Author2, and Author3

<span style="color: red;">ALL CONTENT IN THIS REPORT IS PRELIMINARY AND DRAFT. DO NOT REFERENCE FOR ANY PURPOSE.</span>

Key topics:  

- Aligning levels of effort.  
- Assessing project outcomes: economic, ecological, social.  
- Assessing project performance: stability, resilience, sustainability.  
- Estimating cost: capital, adaptive management, operations and maintenance, end of life.  
- Non-monetary costs: social capital, political will, reversibility.
